reason: SQLite --safe CLI flag bypass; no fix available in AL2023 repo. Lambda images do not expose SQLite CLI to untrusted input.
libxml2 use-after-free in xmlSchemaIDCFillNodeTables; fix requires libxml2 >= 2.12.10 not yet available in AL2023 repo.
libtasn1 stack buffer overflow; fix not yet available in AL2023 repo. Lambda images do not parse untrusted ASN.1 input.
glib heap buffer overflow in g_escape_uri; fix not yet available in AL2023 repo. Lambda images do not expose glib URI parsing to untrusted input.
libcap pam_cap.so group name parsing flaw; Lambda images do not use PAM authentication.
glib buffer underflow in GVariant parsing; fix not yet available in AL2023 repo. Lambda images do not parse untrusted GVariant input.
OpenSSL stack buffer overflow via crafted QUIC packet; fix not yet available in AL2023 repo.
OpenSSL SSL_CIPHER_find crash on unknown cipher in QUIC; fix not yet available in AL2023 repo.
libxml2 stack buffer overflow in xmlSnprintfElements; fix requires libxml2 >= 2.12.10 not yet available in AL2023 repo.
Python tarfile symlink extraction filter bypass (stdlib); cannot be patched via pip. Lambda images do not extract untrusted tar archives at runtime.
Python tarfile symlink extraction filter bypass (stdlib); cannot be patched via pip. Lambda images do not extract untrusted tar archives at runtime.
Python tarfile errorlevel=0 filter bypass (stdlib); cannot be patched via pip. Lambda images do not extract untrusted tar archives at runtime.
Python tarfile arbitrary write with filter=data (stdlib); cannot be patched via pip. Lambda images do not extract untrusted tar archives at runtime.
Go net/url insufficient validation of bracketed IPv6 hostnames; present in NVIDIA CUDA base image Go tooling, not exposed by Lambda runtime.
glibc untrusted LD_LIBRARY_PATH in setuid binaries; Lambda images do not run setuid binaries.
libxml2 heap use-after-free DoS; fix not yet available in AL2023 repo.
libxml2 null pointer dereference DoS; fix not yet available in AL2023 repo.
libxml2 type confusion DoS; fix not yet available in AL2023 repo.
Go crypto/x509 panic on DSA public key certificates; present in NVIDIA CUDA base image Go tooling, not exposed by Lambda runtime.
libarchive out-of-bounds read in RAR seek; Lambda images do not extract untrusted RAR archives.
libexpat large dynamic allocation via small document; fix requires expat >= 2.7.2 not yet available in AL2023 repo.
libxml2 integer overflow in xmlBuildQName; fix not yet available in AL2023 repo.
glib GString memory management flaw on very large strings; fix not yet available in AL2023 repo.
GnuPG armor_filter double-increment OOB; fix requires GnuPG >= 2.4.9 not yet available in AL2023 repo.
OpenSSL PKCS#12 null pointer dereference; fix not yet available in AL2023 repo.
libxslt attribute type flag corruption; fix not yet available in AL2023 repo.
Python tarfile extraction API defect (stdlib); cannot be patched via pip. Lambda images do not extract untrusted tar archives at runtime.
urllib3 decompression bomb on redirect responses; pinned to urllib3==2.6.3 in requirements files but ECR scan may still report against bundled copies in transitive deps.
OpenSSL ASN1_TYPE type confusion in PKCS7_digest_from_attributes; fix not yet available in AL2023 repo.
GnuPG tpm2daemon stack buffer overflow in PKDECRYPT; fix requires GnuPG >= 2.5.17. Lambda images do not use TPM2.
